positive: A symmetrical, detailed mandala illustration featuring celestial bodies and mystical animals. Incorporate stylized elements of constellations, crescent moons, and intertwined mythical dragons. Intricate linework, sacred geometry, deep jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst), ornamental, perfect symmetry, tattoo flash style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, messy lines, random placement, asymmetrical, cartoonish
